why.title: Why this exists
why.problemText1: Creating tokens is easy. Understanding them isn't.
why.problemText2: Most tokens launch without context: no official links, no clear description, no history, no community review — and trust collapses.
why.solutionText1: A verified profile layer for every token.
why.solutionText2: Axiome Launch adds project pages, token passports, community discussion, and transparent economics — so good projects stand out.

features.title: What you can do on Axiome Launch
features.subtitle: Everything a token needs to build trust — from creation to community feedback.

overview.title: Axiome Startup Ecosystem
overview.subtitle: A multi-project Web3 ecosystem on Axiome blockchain. Each project has its own token — LAUNCH ties them all together.
overview.description: We build independent products inside the Axiome ecosystem. Our first live project is Heads or Tails — a PvP game on AXM. LAUNCH is the ecosystem token: stakers earn 20% of commission from each project. Token discovery, community, and governance — all in one place.
overview.card1Desc: Live PvP game on AXM — 50/50, instant results
overview.card2Desc: Ecosystem token — earn revenue from all projects
overview.card3Desc: Propose ideas, vote, and shape the ecosystem

coinflip.title: Heads or Tails
coinflip.subtitle: PvP coin flip game on Axiome blockchain. Two players bet AXM, one creates a bet and the other accepts — winner takes 90%, 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.howDesc: Simple 50/50 mechanics powered by commit-reveal scheme. The creator's choice is sealed on-chain as a hash. When an opponent accepts, the result is determined and paid out instantly in a single atomic transaction.
coinflip.step1Desc: Deposit AXM to your game vault. This is your in-game balance for betting.
coinflip.step2Desc: Set your bet amount in AXM and create a bet. Or browse open bets and accept one with a single click.
coinflip.step3Desc: When a bet is accepted, the smart contract verifies the creator's secret, determines the winner, and distributes the payout — all in one atomic transaction. No delays.
coinflip.step4Desc: Winner receives 90% of the total pot. 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.step5Desc: Invite friends via referral link — earn up to 3% of each pot from your referrals' games across 3 levels.
coinflip.commissionDesc: 10% of each pot goes as platform commission. Winner gets 90% of the total.
coinflip.securityDesc: All logic is on-chain via CosmWasm smart contract. Commit-reveal scheme ensures provable fairness — no one can cheat. Funds are locked in the contract until the result is determined.
coinflip.paramRevealTimeout: Bet expiration: auto-cancel after 3 hours if not accepted
coinflip.paramOneClick: Account activation: one-time Authz delegation for 30 days (no signature per game)
coinflip.coinTokenDesc: COIN is a CW20 utility token on Axiome blockchain. Use COIN for in-game features: shop purchases, cosmetics, lottery and contest participation, creating giveaways, and more. Bets are placed in native AXM.
coinflip.referralDesc: Earn a share of the pot when your referrals play. 3-level system:
coinflip.eventsDesc: The platform hosts regular contests and raffles with real AXM prizes. Contests count your bets automatically — just play. Raffles require clicking 'Join'. Prizes are funded from the 10% commission.

token.title: LAUNCH Token & Staking
token.subtitle: LAUNCH is the ecosystem revenue token. Stake LAUNCH to earn AXM from all project commissions. 100M total supply, CW20 on Axiome blockchain.

allProducts.title: Revenue share
allProducts.desc: 20% of commission distributed to stakers as AXM. More projects = more revenue.

governance.title: Governance
governance.desc: Vote on new projects, grants, and ecosystem decisions.

ecosystem.title: Staking model
ecosystem.desc: Synthetix reward_per_token: fair, proportional, gas-efficient. No lock period — unstake anytime.

staking.title: LAUNCH Staking
staking.subtitle: Stake LAUNCH tokens and earn a share of revenue from all ecosystem projects. Rewards are distributed as native AXM.
staking.step1Desc: Send LAUNCH tokens to the staking contract. No lock period — unstake anytime.
staking.step2Desc: 20% of game commission is sent to the staking contract as AXM.
staking.step3Desc: Rewards accumulate proportionally to your stake. Claim anytime — no vesting, no delays.
staking.revenueDesc: Currently: 20% of commission from every Heads or Tails game. As more projects launch, revenue grows proportionally.
staking.modelDesc: Uses Synthetix reward_per_token model — O(1) gas cost regardless of staker count. Proportional, transparent, on-chain.

vision.title: Long-term vision
vision.text: We're building a sustainable multi-project Web3 ecosystem. Each product (like Heads or Tails) has its own token and economy. LAUNCH holders benefit from every project's success. No hype — real products, real revenue, real value.

disclaimer.text: LAUNCH is an ecosystem revenue token. COIN is a utility token for in-game features. Bets are placed in AXM. Gaming involves risk — only bet what you can afford to lose. We do not promise returns. Play responsibly.
